text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: This isn't a dream, is it?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I have no idea what's going on, but I feel
energized... like I could take on the world!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Heh, this isn't bad at all!
